goal: Screenshot this page. As a senior product designer, rate it /10. One-line verdict + one thing to improve. Dark SaaS dashboard.

action.criteria: As a senior product designer, rate this dark SaaS dashboard design out of 10. This is the Blueprints page at cloud.tangle.tools. Consider: visual hierarchy, navigation clarity, active state indicators for the Blueprints nav item, empty state design, color contrast, typography, spacing, and overall professional polish. Provide a one-line verdict and identify the single most important thing to improve.

steps.expectedEffect: Will receive a comprehensive design analysis with specific rating, verdict, and improvement suggestion for the Blueprints page
